summary: Foreman now parses planner PLAN-JSON through extractJsonBlock, treats missing planner source metadata as fallback/ineligible, and mirrors planner metadata durably.
filesChanged: extensions/foreman/index.ts - use extractJsonBlock + validatePlannerPlan for planner output; default missing persisted source to fallback
extensions/foreman/planner.ts - missing source defaults to manifest-write ineligible
extensions/foreman/ledger.ts - mirror plan.meta.json with other durable ledger files
extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh - added parser/static and missing-source manifest assertions
howToVerify: for t in extensions/foreman/test/*_test.sh; do echo "== $t =="; bash "$t"; done
raw:
## Completed
Applied both safety/spec fixes:
- Foreman now parses planner output via `extractJsonBlock(run.text, PLAN_JSON_START, PLAN_JSON_END)` then `validatePlannerPlan`.
- Missing persisted planner source now defaults to fallback/not eligible.
- Ledger mirror now covers `plan.meta.json`, with test coverage.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - planner PLAN-JSON parsing and missing-source fallback default.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - missing source defaults to manifest-write ineligible.
- `extensions/foreman/ledger.ts` - mirrors `plan.meta.json`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - assertions for extractJsonBlock usage and missing-source decision.
- `extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh` - mirror/restore coverage for `plan.meta.json`.

## How To Verify
`for t in extensions/foreman/test/*_test.sh; do echo "== $t =="; bash "$t"; done`

## Notes
All Foreman tests passed with the command above.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

    "extensions/foreman/planner.ts - missing source defaults to manifest-write ineligible",
    "extensions/foreman/ledger.ts - mirror plan.meta.json with other durable ledger files",
    "extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh - added parser/static and missing-source manifest assertions",
    "extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh - added plan.meta.json mirror/restore assertions"
  ],
  "howToVerify": "for t in extensions/foreman/test/*_test.sh; do echo \"== $t ==\"; bash \"$t\"; done"
}
